title: TRANSPORTATION SERVICES - 211info
text: IMPACT NW SOUTHEAST MULTICULTURAL SENIOR CENTER TRANSPORTATION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assists older adults and adults with disabilities in accessing transportation. Provides escorted door-to-door rides, monthly TriMet bus and LIFT tickets for those who qualify, and group rides to major grocery stores, food banks, and recreational outings. 4610 SE Belmont Street Portland, OR 97215 Eligibility: Age 60 and older and adults with disabilities Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-4:30pm Email (503) 226-0700 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (503) 226-0700 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information. All new riders must be screened by Ride Connection before making a trip reservation. Trip reservations must be made at least 4 business days in advance and are subject to driver and vehicle availability. FEES: None, donations accepted DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Inner southeast Portland from the Willamette River to 82nd Avenue and from Burnside Street to the Clackamas County line (Multnomah County part of zip codes 97202, 97206, 97214, 97215, and 97222) SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-5pm Services: Disability Related Transportation Senior Ride Programs Transportation Passes * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Transportation Passes * Older Adults Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY FACILITIES/CENTERS - SENIOR SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OPTIONS COUNSELING INFORMATION SERVICES - FAMILY CAREGIVER SUPPORT PROGRAM INFORMATION SERVICES - IMPACT KINCARE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. IMPACT NW SOUTHEAST MULTICULTURAL SENIOR CENTER
